hero.headline: Koyon AI da ke Daidaitawa ga Kowane Ɗalibi
hero.subheadline: Ba a Bar Ɗalibi Daya a Baya Ba. Ilimi na musamman da fasahar Brain Clone AI ke ba da karfi wanda ke ƙirƙira bayanan koyo na musamman ga kowane ɗalibi.
hero.slide2Headline: Hanyoyi Na Musamman ga Kowane Mai Koyo
hero.slide2Subheadline: AI dinmu na daidaitawa a lokaci guda, yana gano ƙarfi da giɓi don ƙirƙira tsarin karatu na musamman da ke sa ɗalibai su ci gaba.
hero.slide3Headline: An Ƙera shi don Ɗalibai na IEP — Kowa Ya So Shi
hero.slide3Subheadline: Ko ɗanka yana da IEP, shirin 504, ko kuma kawai yana buƙatar ƙarin tallafi, Brain Clone AI na Aivo na gina gogewa ta koyo mai musamman kamar su.
hero.slide4Headline: Malamai 5 na AI Ƙwararru, Tafiya Ɗaya ta Musamman
hero.slide4Subheadline: Daga lissafi zuwa fahimtar karatu, malaman AI na musamman suna haɗuwa da ɗalibai inda suke kuma suna jagorantar su gaba — da haƙuri, ƙarfafawa, da hankali mai daidaitawa.
hero.slide5Headline: Bi Ci Gaba a Lokaci Guda
hero.slide5Subheadline: Dashboard mai kyau na koyo wanda ke ba ɗalibai, iyaye, da malamai ganin nan take na ci gaba, jerin nasarori, da shawarwarin AI.

features.title: Duk Abin da Ɗalibanka Ke Bukata don Cin Nasara
features.subtitle: AIVO na haɗa AI na zamani da ilimin kimiyyar koyarwa da aka tabbatar don ƙirƙira ƙwarewar koyo da ke daidaitawa ga kowane ɗalibi.

howItWorks.title: Yadda AIVO Yake Aiki
howItWorks.subtitle: Matakai uku masu sauƙi don koyon musamman da ke daidaitawa ga buƙatun musamman na kowane ɗalibi.

aiTutors.title: Sadu da Ƙungiyar Koyon AI Naka
aiTutors.subtitle: Malamai na AI guda biyar masu ƙwarewa, kowane ɗaya da halin kansa da salon koyarwa na musamman da aka ƙera don sa kowane fanni ya zama mai ban sha'awa.

pricing.title: Farashin Mai Sauƙi da Gaskiya
pricing.subtitle: Fara kyauta. Haɓaka lokacin da ka shirya.

demo.title: Duba AIVO Yana Aiki
demo.subtitle: Shirya demo na musamman tare da ƙungiyar ilimi namu.
demo.successMessage: Ƙungiyarmu za ta tuntuɓe ka cikin awanni 24.
demo.sidebarSubtitle: Shirya demo na kyauta na minti 30 na musamman
demo.bullet1: Rangadin musamman na minti 30 na dandamali
demo.bullet2: Ga yadda Brain Clone AI ke daidaitawa ga kowane ɗalibi

contact.title: Tuntuɓe Mu
contact.subtitle: Kana da tambaya? Za mu ji daɗin jin daga gare ka.
contact.successMessage: Za mu amsa maka cikin kwanaki 1-2 na aiki.

cta.headline: Kuna Shirye Don Canza Koyo?
cta.subheadline: Ku shiga cikin ɗalibai sama da 150 da suke koyo tare da AIVO. Fara gwajin kyauta yau — ba tare da katin kuɗi ba.

socialProof.badge: Ɗalibai sama da 150 suna aminta da mu a shirye-shiryen gwaji a ko'ina cikin ƙasa

audienceTabs.title: An Ƙera Shi don Kowa a Fagen Ilimi
audienceTabs.subtitle: Ko kai iyaye ne, malami, ko shugaban gundumar ilimi, AIVO yana da kayan aikin da kake bukata.

statsBand.hoursSaved: Awannin da aka ceci ga malami/mako
